ug.title: Bachelor of Business Administration
ug.eligibility: Passed 10+2 from a recognized board (any stream) with a minimum of 45% aggregate marks for General category and 40% for SC/ST/OBC category candidates.

ug.title: Bachelor of Commerce
ug.eligibility: Passed 10+2 from a recognized board (any stream) with a minimum of 45% aggregate marks for General category and 40% for SC/ST/OBC category candidates.

ug.title: Bachelor of Arts
ug.eligibility: Passed 10+2 from a recognized board (any stream) with a minimum of 45% aggregate marks for General category and 40% for SC/ST/OBC category candidates.

ug.title: Bachelor of Science
ug.eligibility: Passed 10+2 from a recognized board (any stream) with a minimum of 45% aggregate marks for General category and 40% for SC/ST/OBC category candidates.

ug.title: Bachelor of Computer Applications
ug.eligibility: Passed 10+2 from a recognized board (any stream) with a minimum of 45% aggregate marks for General category and 40% for SC/ST/OBC category candidates.

pg.title: Master of Business Administration
pg.eligibility: Graduation in any discipline with a minimum of 40% marks in the final qualifying examination. Candidates securing less than 40% may appear for an eligibility test; admission will be granted upon successfully clearing the test

pg.title: Master of Computer Applications
pg.eligibility: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science / Engineering Bachelor's Degree in Science / Commerce / Arts with Mathematics

pg.title: Master of Arts
pg.eligibility: Graduation completing Degree (3 years or 4 years Degree Program)

pg.title: Master of Commerce
pg.eligibility: Graduation Degree (3 years or 4 years Degree Program)

pg.title: Master of Science
pg.eligibility: Bachelor's degree in any Science discipline.

diploma.title: Diploma in Basic Science (PCM / PCB / ZBC)
PG Diploma in Computer Application (PGDCA)
diploma.eligibility: 10+2 and Graduation Degree from any recognised board

diploma.title: PG Diploma in Business Administration (PGDBA)
diploma.eligibility: 10+2 and Graduation Degree from any recognised board

diploma.title: PG Diploma in Accounts and Finance
diploma.eligibility: 10+2 and Graduation Degree from any recognised board
